nasb.text: They journeyed from Alush and camped at Rephidim; now it was there that the people had no water to drink.

esv.text: And they set out from Alush and camped at Rephidim, where there was no water for the people to drink.

cnv.text: 從亞錄起行，在利非訂安營，在那裡眾民沒有水喝。

ccb.text: 从亚录启行，至利非订扎营，在那里民众没有水喝；
